paper.title_en: Modeling Uncertainties in Modified Gravity Predictions for the Stochastic Gravitational-Wave Background
paper.abstract_en: We investigate the impact of modified gravity on the stochastic gravitational-wave background (SGWB) generated by a cosmological population of unresolved binary black hole mergers. We consider two complementary classes of beyond-General Relativity (GR) effects: waveform-generation modifications described within the parametrized post-Einsteinian (ppE) framework and cosmological propagation effects associated with a modified gravitational-wave luminosity distance. Astrophysical uncertainties in the binary black hole population are consistently incorporated using a Power-Law plus Peak mass model combined with a Madau--Dickinson merger-rate evolution. Using SGWB forecasts for Advanced LIGO, the Einstein Telescope (ET), and Cosmic Explorer (CE), we perform injection-recovery analyses jointly varying modified-gravity and astrophysical population parameters. We show that frequency-dependent ppE corrections produce characteristic distortions in the SGWB spectral shape and can be meaningfully constrained by third-generation detectors, particularly CE. In contrast, modified propagation effects mainly induce smooth amplitude rescalings and exhibit stronger degeneracies with astrophysical uncertainties. Our results demonstrate that future SGWB observations will provide a complementary probe of gravitational physics across cosmic history and may open new avenues for testing deviations from GR beyond individually resolved compact-binary events.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文研究修正引力对随机引力波背景的影响，与PTA主题高度相关，方法严谨，预测了第三代探测器的约束能力。
decision.title_zh: 模拟随机引力波背景的修正引力预测中的不确定性
decision.abstract_zh: 我们研究了修正引力对由宇宙未解析双黑洞并合群体产生的随机引力波背景（SGWB）的影响。我们考虑了两类互补的广义相对论（GR）之外的效应：在参数化后爱因斯坦（ppE）框架内描述的波形生成修正，以及与修正的引力波光度距离相关的宇宙传播效应。双黑洞群体的天体物理不确定性通过结合幂律加峰值质量模型和Madau-Dickinson并合率演化被一致地纳入。利用先进LIGO、爱因斯坦望远镜（ET）和宇宙探索者（CE）的SGWB预测，我们进行了联合变化的修正引力和天体物理群体参数的注入-恢复分析。我们表明，频率依赖的ppE修正会产生SGWB谱形状的特征畸变，并且可以被第三代探测器（特别是CE）有意义地约束。相比之下，修正的传播效应主要引起平滑的幅度重缩放，并与天体物理不确定性表现出更强的简并性。我们的结果表明，未来的SGWB观测将为整个宇宙历史中的引力物理提供互补的探测，并可能为测试超越单个解析致密双星事件的GR偏离开辟新途径。
